since_last: 62% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.13%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.02% · BTC +2.69% · Gold +1.58% · Nasdaq100 -1.18%. 62% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.13%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.13%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -11.70%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.70%, APP +10.59%, META +10.41%, PLTR +9.24%, AMBA +8.58%. Laggards: KLAC -11.70%, AMAT -10.85%, LRCX -10.82%, TER -10.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.05% at $162.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
